previous_shadow_review_summary.label: UNKNOWN_STRICT_CLOSE_SHADOW_REVIEW_POSITIVE_PNL_RISK_BUDGET_FAIL_SAMPLE_THIN
previous_shadow_review_summary.interpretation: The prior no-order run had positive pair PnL but failed sample and normalized residual/pair-tail budgets. It lacked residual-tail exemplars, so it could not identify which individual source actions created persistent residual without events JSONL.

selected_shadow_review_question.name: late_repair90_residual_tail_exemplar_no_order_review
selected_shadow_review_question.question: In one bounded live/no-order same-host window, do action-level residual-tail exemplars show whether late_repair_only90 residual risk is concentrated in a sample-preserving source context that can support a new local mechanism, while strict-close/source-link safety remains measurable?
selected_shadow_review_question.mechanism_under_review: diagnostic residual-tail exemplar review over late_repair_only_after_s=90 with pairing_only_when_residual, activation opp_seen15, pair-source summaries, source-link transition summaries, and residual-tail exemplars. No fill-to-balance, no portfolio-ledger, no price caps, no static cap/target sweep, no cooldown/admission caps, no risk_increasing_pair_fill_cap.
why_this_question_now: The previous strict-close no-order review failed risk budgets but did not expose action-level residual source fields.
The latest local instrumentation now captures source_sequence, pre-seed inventory, ledger proxy, pair contribution, and residual contribution per residual lot without pulling events JSONL.
A new mechanism should come from exemplar-level residual concentration, not from aggregate bucket guessing or summary-only removal.

checks: shared-ingress broker_manifest.json present and fresh enough for read-only client context
root disk and inode usage below exhaustion thresholds
sudo -n -u pmofi availability if same-host runner is approved

unknown_or_tradeoff_if: candidates are below 100 but source-link and residual-tail exemplar fields are complete
bare pair economics are positive but normalized residual or pair-tail budgets fail
residual-tail exemplars identify concentration but do not yet imply a sample-preserving non-price mechanism
source_sequence coverage is below 95% but quote/order/source fields otherwise link residual lots
required event-lite/source-link summary fields are absent from only some markets
discard_if: residual risk remains broad across exemplars with no sample-preserving mechanism lead
only summary-only removal would improve metrics
candidate sample is destroyed by a retrospective filter

results imply frozen mechanisms such as fill-to-balance90, portfolio-ledger, source/public price caps, static caps, cooldown/admission caps, dynamic risk-state gate, or risk_increasing_pair_fill_cap_v1

source_truth_boundary.source_kind: future no-order summary diagnostics only; replay_store_v2 remains selected-action source-truth research-only
source_truth_boundary.interpretation: This artifact selects a bounded diagnostic no-order shadow-review question. It is not approval to start EC2/shadow/canary and not promotion evidence.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_RESIDUAL_TAIL_EXEMPLAR_NO_ORDER_SHADOW_REVIEW_QUESTION_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: The new local instrumentation is sufficient to define a precise no-order diagnostic question, but not sufficient to start or promote without explicit approval and a future bounded result.

next_action.description: Wait for exact main-thread approval before any EC2/no-order shadow preflight or run. If approval is not given, continue local-only verifier/spec work.
next_action.executable_if_approved: Run bounded safety preflight for late_repair90_residual_tail_exemplar_no_order_review, then start only the approved no-order dry-run shadow if preflight passes.
